messages.content: Send an email to alice@example.com with subject 'Project Update' summarising that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.

arguments.subject: Project Update
arguments.body:
Hi Alice,

I wanted to give you a quick update on the backend migration project.

The migration is currently 80% complete and remains on track for delivery this Friday as planned.

Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards

content.delta: Done! The email has been sent to alice@example.com with the subject "Project Update" summarizing that the backend migration is 80% complete and on track for Friday delivery.
